creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=279136#c3 in context with what we know here results in "LLVM 14 or newer FROM PORTS should work" - 14 and 15 amd64 I've tested, 16 from port is fine (which my patch on this PR does not allow), Yuri@ claims 17 from ports is also fine.
